metadata.title: AuJet | Revolutionary Non-invasive Drug Delivery System
metadata.description: GNT's 6th-gen AuJet delivers micron-sized active ingredients to the dermis at 405m/s. Painless, non-invasive, suitable for exosomes and hyaluronic acid.

faqSchema.a1: Completely painless and non-invasive. AuJet uses pneumatic and micron-level atomization technology to instantly penetrate the stratum corneum at 405m/s. Patients only feel a gentle airflow and micro-shockwave massage.
faqSchema.q2: How long is the recovery period after treatment?
faqSchema.a2: Zero recovery period. No open wounds are created, and normal daily routine and makeup can be resumed immediately after treatment.

hero.desc: AuJet uses patented aerodynamic technology to atomize active ingredients into micron-sized droplets, delivering them directly to the dermis at supersonic speeds.

supersonic.title: Supersonic Delivery
supersonic.desc: 405m/s extreme airflow instantly penetrates the stratum corneum barrier, delivering active ingredients to the dermis.

micron.title: Micron Atomization
micron.desc: Patented atomization technology converts essence into micron-sized droplets, ensuring uniform and deep absorption.

pulse.title: Millisecond Pulse Tech
pulse.desc: Precisely controls injection frequency, providing a gentle millisecond shockwave pneumatic massage effect during delivery.

benefits.title: Three Core Effects of the Device

delivery.title: Active Ingredient Delivery
delivery.desc: Deliver active ingredients into the skin to reach root causes and unlock real efficacy.

shockwave.title: Shockwave Massage
shockwave.desc: Pulse-based firing creates deep massage effects and promotes subcutaneous blood circulation.

gas.title: Gas Benefits
gas.desc: Combined with gases for additional therapeutic support.

co2.title: Carbon Dioxide (CO2)
co2.desc: Promotes microcirculation and helps with dark circles and skin laxity.

o2.title: Oxygen (O2)
o2.desc: Improves cell activity, supports post-treatment recovery, and improves dull hypoxic skin.

why.title: Why Does Skin Need Delivery Devices?
why.desc1: The outermost layer of human skin, the 'stratum corneum', is a natural defense barrier that effectively blocks harmful external substances but also hinders the absorption of skincare products and active drug ingredients. Traditional application methods allow only a very small amount (usually less than 1%) of active ingredients to truly penetrate the stratum corneum and reach the dermis.
why.desc2: To solve this problem, we need drug delivery devices. Through physical or chemical assistance, we temporarily break through the stratum corneum barrier to deliver macromolecular active ingredients (such as hyaluronic acid, collagen, exosomes) directly to the deep layers of the skin, significantly improving absorption and efficacy while avoiding the pain and infection risks associated with traditional syringe injections.

atomization.title: Enhanced Transdermal Penetration via Atomization
atomization.desc1: AuJet uses exclusive high-pressure airflow technology to instantly atomize liquid skincare products or drugs into micron-sized droplets.
atomization.desc2: When these extremely fine droplets are sprayed onto the skin surface at a supersonic speed of up to 405m/s, the powerful kinetic energy instantly opens the lipid channels between stratum corneum cells, forming tiny 'liquid needles'. The volume of these micron droplets is far smaller than pores and intercellular spaces, allowing them to easily penetrate the epidermis and distribute evenly in the dermis.
atomization.desc3: Compared to traditional application, atomized delivery not only increases transdermal penetration by dozens of times but also, due to its uniform distribution, allows active ingredients to exert maximum effect in the underlying skin layers, achieving excellent results in deep drug delivery and skincare.

p1.title: Drug / Essence Delivery Device

p3.title: Gold Leaf Wine

questions.a: Completely painless and non-invasive. Since it uses air contact, patients only feel a gentle airflow and micro-shockwave massage.

questions.q: How long is the recovery period after treatment?
questions.a: Zero recovery period. No open wounds are created; simply moisturize after the session.

questions.q: What is the recommended treatment frequency?
questions.a: Generally recommended once a week initially, then once every 2-3 months for maintenance after results stabilize.

questions.q: What active ingredients can AuJet be combined with?
questions.a: Extremely extensive. Including small-molecule hyaluronic acid, growth factors, exosomes, and various liquid cosmetics. Since it's physical delivery, it doesn't destroy ingredient activity. Any non-precipitating solution can be used.

questions.q: Can it be used with other beauty devices?
questions.a: Absolutely. AuJet only performs physical penetration of ingredients, no need to worry about other effects.
Ingredient ampoules, Venturi tubes, and hygienic head covers. To prevent cross-contamination, these parts should be disposed of after use.

questions.q: How long does a single treatment take?
questions.a: Depending on the treatment, approximately 25-40 minutes per session.
Fragile mucous membranes and surrounding areas (eyes/ears), open wounds, superficial blood vessels, and neuropathy.

AuJet T6 is the latest model designed for aesthetic use. We continue the T4 generation medical device technology, delivering the highest specifications for skin and follicle penetration in the safest, most portable design.

gasEquipment.title: Gas Equipment and Usage Guide
gasEquipment.description: Choose between high-pressure cylinders and air compressors based on treatment needs, then match suitable gases for optimal outcomes.

sourceComparisons.requirementText:
一次療程 (5000發)
約需 160 ml 的氣體
可使用 CO2、N2、O2 或常見惰性氣體
limitations: 氣體耗盡時需做氣體充填

sourceComparisons.requirementText:
馬達：350W
最大壓力：>100psi (7 kgf/cm2)
出氣量：9 L/min
容量：3L
limitations: 會受空氣品質影響，建議搭配 HEPA 濾網過濾空氣
